subject: Re: import particleseries data
body:
Hi Mingyu,
Please keep the list in cc. It sounds like the file generated by cryoDRGN-ET is incompatible for whatever reason, I would recommend looking carefully at the file and maybe asking the developers of that package for support.
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Sep 17, 2024, at 01:11, Min-gyu Jung <mgmg980910@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
HI Alister
I used cryodrgn-et and got some particleseries star file from distinctive cluster. When I tried to reimport this particleseries starfile into M for refinement, M couldn't recognize the particleseries starfile (e.g. 0/322550 particles in the import step). 
2024년 9월 17일 (화) 오후 1:27, Alister Burt <
alisterburt@gmail.com
>님이 작성:
Hi Mingyu,
You haven’t given us enough information here and the workflow you describe works fine in the tutorial - is there something different about your data compared to the tutorial? What errors are you getting?
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Sep 16, 2024, at 18:08, Mingyu Jung <
jmg0910@snu.ac.kr
> wrote:
﻿Hi all,
I got particleseries data from M and refine in relion. When I tried to re-import this particleseries data to M, M couldn't recognize the particles and star files.Is there any ways to import particleseries data to M?
Thanks!
Best,
Mingyu
